advantages.advantagesAfterText: At Casinova Casino, one of our strongest points is the combination of casino games, live tables, and a full sportsbook inside one account. We also stand out through regular promotions, VIP levels, tournaments, and challenges that keep the overall experience more dynamic and structured.

history.title: About Casinova
history.description1: At Casinova Casino, we stand out by combining a substantial welcome package with recurring weekly promotions and dedicated sports offers. The experience is further strengthened by network tournaments, cashback mechanics, and separate deals for live casino and sportsbook activity.
items: Welcome package up to $5,000 + 350 free spins
Tournament and promo prizes up to $18,000,000
Sports offers up to 100% boost and $750 reload
history.description2: Casinova Casino is a space where online casino games, live tables, jackpot content, and sports betting are combined inside one account. Our platform is built around smooth navigation, so moving between slots, table games, and sports events feels direct and uncomplicated.
history.description3: The game lobby includes thousands of titles, which makes it easy to match different moods and playing styles. We cover both classic categories and more modern formats, including Megaways, Bonus Buys, and live game shows. A demo mode is available for part of the catalogue, making it easier to explore game mechanics before switching to real-money play. In the live section, we bring together roulette, blackjack, baccarat, poker, and show-style titles that create a more immersive atmosphere. The jackpot area adds another layer through large prize pools and network-style promotional events. On the betting side, we offer pre-match markets, live betting, and virtual sports, so the platform remains relevant beyond casino play alone. Promotions are not limited to a single welcome offer, which gives the overall product more continuity. Our structure includes a welcome package, weekly reload offers, weekend reload deals, live-casino cashback, and dedicated sportsbook promotions. We also add depth through challenges, where rewards are tied to completing specific tasks. This creates a clearer sense of progression and gives regular activity more shape. The VIP program adds tiered value through higher withdrawal limits, personalised offers, cashback, and a personal manager on the higher levels. Tournaments and leaderboards strengthen the competitive side and turn standard sessions into event-driven play. Around-the-clock support helps with bonuses, verification, and payment questions. Altogether, our casino works as a broad entertainment ecosystem rather than a narrow slot-only platform.

customHtml.title: Casinova: your comfort — rules, security, support
customHtml.description:
Casinova Casino — Account Rules, Restrictions and Responsible Play

At Casinova Casino, access is available only to adult users. Our platform works on the basis of accepted general terms, bonus conditions, game rules, and privacy-related documents. We treat each account as personal and non-transferable, which means it must belong to one individual only. Duplicate accounts, false information, and attempts to bypass platform controls are not allowed. Account credentials should remain private because activity inside the profile is treated as activity of the account holder. Before withdrawals, and sometimes before certain deposits or bonuses, we may request identity verification, proof of age, proof of address, and payment confirmation. If documents are requested, they need to be provided within the stated timeframe, otherwise restrictions may apply to the account or its payments. We also enforce fair-play standards and do not allow fraud, collusion, bonus abuse, or low-risk wagering schemes designed to exploit promotions. When a bonus is active, its wagering rules must be completed before related winnings become withdrawable. Responsible play is an important part of our operating model, which is why self-exclusion is available through customer support. If gambling stops feeling like entertainment, stepping back or closing access becomes the right decision. Some games and providers may also carry their own access limitations. Taken together, our rules are designed to keep the environment clear, secure, and manageable for every user.


Participation Conditions

  • • Access is limited to users aged 18 and over.
  • • Acceptance of general terms, bonus rules, and game-specific rules is required.
  • • Each user is responsible for checking the legality of online gambling in their own jurisdiction.
  • • One account is intended for one person only.

Restrictions

  • • Accounts cannot be sold, transferred, bought, or shared.
  • • Duplicate profiles and the use of false or third-party data are prohibited.
  • • Fraud, collusion, bonus abuse, and minimal-risk betting patterns are not accepted.
  • • Bonus-linked funds cannot be withdrawn in breach of wagering rules.

Verification and Account Safety

  • • KYC checks may include identity, age, address, and payment verification.
  • • Requested documents must be submitted within the stated deadline.
  • • Login credentials should be kept confidential at all times.
  • • Transactions may be limited until verification is fully completed.

Responsible Play

  • • Self-exclusion can be arranged through customer support.
  • • Time, session frequency, and staking behaviour should remain under control.
  • • Taking a break is the right step when play no longer feels balanced.
  • • Gambling should remain entertainment rather than a financial solution.

Casinova Casino — Licence, Data Protection and Privacy Standards

At Casinova Casino, security is built around account rules, verification procedures, and protected data transmission. Our general terms state that access to games is provided through a protected network that uses encryption technology for sensitive data. This means the safety model is based not only on passwords, but also on secure handling of information between the player and the platform.


For financial and compliance protection, we apply KYC procedures. We may verify identity, age, residential details, and other relevant circumstances before or after deposits and withdrawal requests. When documents are requested, they must be submitted within the stated timeframe, otherwise payment delays or account restrictions may apply.


Customer fund handling is also addressed directly in our terms. The rules state that customer balances are held separately from company funds in dedicated client bank accounts. This structure strengthens the protection of player balances and creates a clearer framework for fund custody.


Our privacy approach is reflected through the broader privacy framework and the active cookie notice. The cookie document explains that device data, browser data, site usage behaviour, email interaction data, and IP-based location data may be collected. It also describes cookie categories, storage duration, legal bases, and consent controls for performance and targeting technologies.


We also provide a data-protection contact through the DPO email listed in the cookie notice. Users can manage cookie settings, restrict interest-based advertising, and limit certain tracking tools through browser and device-level controls. In practical terms, this gives privacy management more substance than a single consent banner.


On licensing, the public-facing site places more visible emphasis on rules, promotions, and operational security than on a prominent licence card. At the same time, established casino review profiles associate the brand with an Anjouan Gaming Board licence and with KNG Marketing LTD. For that reason, reliability is best evaluated through the full picture: licence context, KYC, withdrawal processing rules, privacy controls, and support quality together.


Casinova Casino — Deposits, Withdrawals and Payment Limits

At Casinova Casino, the payment flow combines fast deposits with more structured withdrawal processing. Public brand pages confirm card methods such as Visa and MasterCard as well as Interac, while industry profiles additionally list bank transfer, Skrill, Jeton, MiFinity, and selected crypto solutions. Deposits are generally fast, especially for cards and alternative instant methods. Withdrawals are more controlled because they depend on internal review, KYC, and VIP-related payout limits. Our terms state that the finance team reviews withdrawal requests within 3 business days after the request is made, or within 3 business days after the previous withdrawal was paid, provided checks are completed. Once approved, the final speed depends on the payment method. E-wallets are usually the fastest option and often arrive within 0–24 hours after approval. Card withdrawals commonly take around 3–5 days after approval, while bank transfers may require 3–7 days. Full withdrawal access depends on verification, which may include ID, proof of address, and proof of payment method. Payments can remain pending until verification is completed. Our rules also state that no more than three withdrawal requests may remain pending at the same time. VIP status affects daily and monthly limits, and those limits increase meaningfully across higher levels. The platform also reserves the right to use a different payout method from the one originally requested when processing requires it. For fund protection, customer balances are kept separately from company funds, and at least x1 wagering of deposited funds is required before withdrawal.


Method Deposit speed Payout after approval
Visa / MasterCard Usually instant 3–5 days
Interac Usually instant Up to 24 hours – 3 days
Skrill / Jeton / MiFinity Usually instant 0–24 hours
Bank Transfer Minutes to 1 day 3–7 days
Crypto / alternative methods Usually fast 0–24 hours

Minimum Withdrawal and Limit Structure

  • • External payment profiles place the general minimum withdrawal around the equivalent of €10, which is roughly AUD 16.5–16.7 depending on exchange rate and account currency.
  • • Level 1: up to AUD 800 per day and AUD 10,500 per month.
  • • Level 2: up to AUD 800 per day and AUD 16,000 per month.
  • • Level 3: up to AUD 1,200 per day and AUD 20,000 per month.
  • • Level 4: up to AUD 1,600 per day and AUD 24,000 per month.
  • • Level 5: up to AUD 2,500 per day and AUD 35,000 per month.

Casinova Casino — Customer Support and Service Quality

At Casinova Casino, customer support plays an important role because the platform combines casino games, live titles, bonus systems, and sportsbook activity in one place. The main contact channel is live chat, which is placed directly in the interface and presented as available 24/7. This is the most practical option for fast questions about bonuses, verification, deposits, withdrawals, or technical issues. The second public channel is email, which is better suited to more detailed communication and document sharing. On the visible brand pages, live chat and email are the core support methods. A public phone number is not highlighted as a primary contact route in the main support blocks, so urgent matters are more naturally handled through chat. This structure fits the broader iGaming standard, where written communication is preferred for tracking requests and preserving account history. A clear strength is constant availability: support is described as 24/7 both on the official platform and in external brand profiles. That matters especially for live casino sessions, sportsbook questions, and time-sensitive payment issues. Chat works best for quick responses, while email is more suitable for complex or document-based cases. Our platform also supports a multilingual environment, which improves both navigation and customer communication. Public brand profiles list a broad language range including English, German, French, Spanish, Italian, Polish, Finnish, Norwegian, Portuguese, Hungarian, Czech, and Greek. This creates a more understandable environment for international users. In practical terms, support covers bonuses, account checks, payments, and general operational questions. For players, that means most common situations can be resolved through one central service layer.


Contact Channels

  • • 24/7 live chat is the main fast-response channel.
  • • Email is suitable for detailed cases and document-related requests.
  • • A public phone line is not prominently listed in the main visible support sections.

Response Time and Service Style

  • • Live chat is best for urgent questions about bonuses, KYC, and payments.
  • • Email is more practical for complex back-and-forth communication.
  • • A round-the-clock schedule is especially useful for live casino and sportsbook activity.

Language Availability

  • • The platform is designed for a multilingual audience.
  • • Public brand profiles list a wide range of supported interface languages.
  • • This reduces friction when solving payment, verification, and bonus-related questions.

customHtml_2.title: Entertainment and Gaming at Casinova
customHtml_2.description:
Casinova Casino — Loyalty Program and VIP Levels

At Casinova Casino, the loyalty structure is built around VIP levels and broader activity-based rewards rather than one-off bonuses alone. The visible VIP page shows a five-level program. At the entry levels, we keep on-site promotions and 24/7 live chat as part of the core value. From Level 3 onward, the program adds personalised offers, higher withdrawal limits, and cashback. Levels 4 and 5 also include a personal VIP manager, which makes the service noticeably more tailored. One of the strongest aspects of the program is that loyalty is linked not only to bonus access, but also to practical payout flexibility. That gives the system more substance in everyday use. Our rules state that VIP level is determined by activity during the previous 90 calendar days before a withdrawal request is submitted. The ratio of deposits, withdrawals, and bonuses received also affects the status. If a player is inactive for a month, the account is automatically reduced to the lowest level. That means VIP is dynamic rather than fixed forever. The public pages do not clearly disclose exact numerical thresholds for moving from one level to another, so overall activity remains the main visible indicator. Beyond VIP itself, the platform also uses Coins and Shop mechanics that expand the sense of progression. Every AUD 15 wagered on casino games grants 1 Coin, while deposits, tournaments, weekly challenges, one-time challenges, and level progression can also generate Coins. This gives the loyalty ecosystem more depth than a standard VIP ladder.


Registration Conditions

  • • No separate complex VIP sign-up is presented as a mandatory public step.
  • • The standard path is to create an account, play regularly, and maintain activity.
  • • VIP status is based on the previous 90 days of activity.
  • • Deposits, withdrawals, and bonus behaviour influence status.

Levels and How They Are Reached

  • • Level 1 — entry level with on-site promotions and 24/7 live chat.
  • • Level 2 — next activity-based step with on-site promotions and 24/7 live chat.
  • • Level 3 — active level with personalised offers, higher withdrawal limits, and cashback.
  • • Level 4 — high tier with personalised offers, higher withdrawal limits, cashback, and a personal VIP manager.
  • • Level 5 — top visible tier with personalised offers, higher withdrawal limits, cashback, and a personal VIP manager.
  • • Exact numerical progression thresholds are not publicly detailed on the visible pages.

Available Benefits and Bonus Value

  • • On-site promotions — access to regular platform campaigns.
  • • 24/7 Live Chat — always-on support access.
  • • Personalised offers — tailored bonus and promo suggestions.
  • • Cashback — return of part of losses on eligible stages and offers.
  • • Higher withdrawal limits — daily limits rise from AUD 800 at Level 1 to AUD 2,500 at Level 5, while monthly limits rise from AUD 10,500 to AUD 35,000.
  • • Personal VIP Manager — dedicated support on higher levels.
  • • Coins and Shop — 1 Coin for every AUD 15 wagered on casino games, plus additional Coins from deposits, tournaments, challenges, and level progression.

Casinova Casino — Bonuses, Winnings, Special Offers and Event Promotions

At Casinova Casino, the bonus structure goes far beyond a basic welcome offer. New players can access a welcome package worth up to $5,000 and 350 free spins, spread across multiple deposits rather than compressed into a single step. That creates a longer launch phase and a more layered start. For ongoing casino activity, we also run a weekend reload worth up to $1,050 and 50 free spins when qualifying conditions are met. There is also a weekly reload that provides 50 free spins on the first qualifying weekly transaction from Monday to Thursday. For live casino activity, a separate live cashback offer returns 25% up to $300 based on net losses during the promo period. In the wider casino section, the promotions page also lists weekly cashback of 15% up to $4,500, while a major network-style event called Spinoleague is shown with a prize volume of up to $18,000,000. That turns promotions into more than a simple bonus cycle and adds a competitive event layer. On the sportsbook side, the offer mix includes a first deposit bonus of 100% up to $150, a weekly reload of 50% up to $750, cashback of 10% up to $750, an accumulator boost of up to 100%, a 100% bore draw refund, 2 goals ahead early payout, and boosted odds. This clearly shows that the product is structured for both casino and sports activity. Beyond standard promotions, we also run weekly challenges and one-time challenges. These tasks award Coins, and some weekly blocks add extra rewards when 20 out of 40 tasks are completed. The tasks can involve spins, number of bets, minimum deposit size, odds, or sport category. Tournaments and network events add another motivational layer. Tournament cards typically display the prize pool, minimum qualifying stake, and event timer, which makes entry conditions easy to understand. Altogether, our bonus model feels multi-layered, with welcome packages, reload offers, cashback, sportsbook incentives, challenges, tournaments, and network prize campaigns.


Casino Bonuses and Special Offers

  • • Welcome Package — up to $5,000 + 350 free spins; a multi-stage new player package.
  • • Weekend Reload — up to $1,050 + 50 free spins; a recurring weekend campaign.
  • • Weekly Reload — 50 free spins; tied to the first qualifying weekly transaction.
  • • Live Cashback — 25% up to $300; based on net losses in live casino.
  • • Weekly Cashback — 15% up to $4,500; a separate cashback layer for casino activity.
  • • Spinoleague — up to $18,000,000; a large network-style promo and competitive event.

Sports Offers

  • • Sport First Deposit Bonus — 100% up to $150.
  • • Sport Weekly Reload — 50% up to $750.
  • • Sport Cashback Bonus — 10% up to $750.
  • • Accumulator Boost — up to 100% enhancement.
  • • Bore Draw — 100% refund within promo conditions.
  • • 2 Goals Ahead Early Payout — early settlement when a team leads by two goals.
  • • Boosted Odds — enhanced prices on selected events.

Events and Entertainment Layers

  • • Weekly Challenges — reward-based tasks for casino and sportsbook activity.
  • • One-Time Challenges — mission-style tasks that award Coins.
  • • Tournaments — event cards show prize pool, qualifying minimum stake, and countdown.
  • • Leaderboards — add a competitive dimension to standard play.

Casinova Casino — Games, Live Titles and Betting Markets

At Casinova Casino, the product mix is structured so users can move between fast slot sessions, strategic table games, live dealer tables, and sports betting markets without leaving one platform. The core of the catalogue is built around pokies and online slots, with both classic formats and more modern categories represented. We also highlight Megaways, Bonus Buys, exclusive titles, instant games, and jackpots, which makes it easier to switch between volatile slots, feature-heavy mechanics, and large-prize formats inside the same interface. Demo mode is available for part of the catalogue, which helps users explore mechanics before moving into real-money play. Our table-game section includes blackjack, roulette, dice, poker, and baccarat. That creates a useful balance between simple game flow and formats with a stronger decision element. The live casino expands this structure with real tables and show-style entertainment. In this section, we include live roulette, live blackjack, baccarat and dice, poker, international tables, and game shows. The visible live-game lobby makes it clear that we focus not only on classic content, but also on more theatrical titles such as Money Time, Mega Wheel, Treasure Island, and Sweet Bonanza Candyland. For users who prefer competition, the platform also includes jackpot content and a tournament ecosystem. On the betting side, we cover sportsbook, live betting, and virtual sports. The public sportsbook navigation highlights football, tennis, table tennis, basketball, ice hockey, American football, and baseball. Pre-match betting supports line-based planning before events begin, while live betting is aimed at dynamic, in-play decisions. Virtual sports add a faster-cycle option for users who want continuous markets without waiting for real fixtures. Overall, our product range goes well beyond slots and works as a fully blended casino-plus-sports environment.


Game Categories

  • • Pokies / Slots — classic and modern slot content.
  • • Megaways — slots with dynamic win-way structures.
  • • Bonus Buys — titles with fast access to bonus features.
  • • Instant Games — quicker gameplay formats.
  • • Jackpots — games built around large prize pools.

Table and Live Content

  • • Blackjack
  • • Roulette
  • • Dice
  • • Poker
  • • Baccarat
  • • Live Roulette / Live Blackjack / Live Poker
  • • Game Shows — Money Time, Mega Wheel, Treasure Island, Sweet Bonanza Candyland, and more.

Betting Formats

  • • Sportsbook — pre-match lines and regular event markets.
  • • Live Betting — in-play wagering during active events.
  • • Virtual Sports — fast-cycle betting markets.
  • • Popular Sports — football, tennis, table tennis, basketball, ice hockey, American football, and baseball.

Casinova Casino — Minimum and Maximum Betting Range

At Casinova Casino, betting ranges vary by game, provider, and format, with the clearest examples visible in live casino and game-show content. Even inside the live section, entry points and ceilings differ noticeably: some titles start with a very soft minimum, while the upper limits move into genuine high-limit territory. For tournaments, a separate qualifying minimum stake often determines leaderboard participation and access to event prize pools. The examples below reflect visible ranges shown directly in the current lobby and tournament cards.


Game Type Min Bet Max Bet
Live Roulette (Mega Roulette) AUD 0.20 AUD 40,000
Live Game Show (Money Time) AUD 0.20 AUD 9,200
Live Game Show (Mega Wheel) AUD 0.20 AUD 4,000
Live Game Show (Treasure Island) AUD 0.20 AUD 8,400
Live Game Show (Sweet Bonanza Candyland) AUD 0.40 AUD 9,000
Tournament qualifying stake AUD 0.10 Event-specific

Casinova Casino — Tournaments and Leaderboards: How Participation Works

At Casinova Casino, tournaments and leaderboards add a competitive layer on top of regular gameplay. Event cards visibly show the prize pool, the minimum qualifying stake, and the countdown timer, so entry conditions are clear from the start. Participation usually depends on playing the listed games or the qualifying game pool while respecting the event’s minimum stake. In the challenges system, we can also see that progression logic may track spin count, number of bets, minimum bet size, and in sportsbook tasks even odds requirements. That helps explain the broader structure behind activity-based ranking and rewards on the platform. Within weekly challenges, rewards are granted for individual completed tasks, while an extra reward is unlocked after 20 out of 40 tasks are finished. Sports challenges may also use minimum-odds and bet-type conditions. In tournament play itself, final placement is typically determined by the rules of the specific event, while the open cards mainly show the prize pool, entry threshold, and remaining time. The easiest way to track ranking is through the tournament section and the event card itself, where leaderboard movement is reflected. Prize collection normally follows successful qualification and the final event settlement after the tournament ends. If an event pays in cash, bonus value, or another reward type, crediting follows that event’s own rules. For consistent results, it is not only about volume of play, but also about meeting the formal criteria of the event: the right game, the right qualifying stake, and the correct promo period. In practice, tournaments on our platform reward regularity, discipline, and close attention to the rules of each individual campaign.


Useful Tournament Notes

  • • Tournament cards usually show the prize pool, minimum qualifying stake, and end timer.
  • • Participation depends on playing qualifying titles and meeting the minimum stake requirement.
  • • In challenge structures, progression may track spins, number of bets, bet size, bet type, and odds.
  • • Weekly challenge bonus rewards unlock after 20 of 40 tasks are completed.
  • • Leaderboard position is easiest to monitor inside the tournament section and event card.
  • • Prizes are generally credited after the event ends and final results are calculated.

items.title: Can one account be used for both casino play and sports betting?
items.answer: Yes. At Casinova Casino, one account connects casino, live casino, sportsbook, live betting, and virtual sports.

items.title: Is demo mode available?
items.answer: Yes. Demo mode is available for part of the game library, which helps users explore mechanics before real-money play.

items.title: How many withdrawal requests can remain pending at the same time?
items.answer: Under the current rules, no more than three withdrawal requests may remain pending on one account.

items.title: Is there a maximum stake while a bonus is active?
items.answer: Yes. With an active casino bonus, the maximum bet is limited, and the visible current threshold is AUD 7.5.

items.title: How long does document review usually take?
items.answer: External brand profiles indicate that documents are typically reviewed within 1–3 business days before the standard withdrawal cycle continues.
